nodes.label: AI as passive background tool
nodes.grounding_span: A lot of my work's AI use is actually quite passive in the background

nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.label_negative: AI for data input with serious consequences
nodes.grounding_span: When it comes to summarising and researching, however, I'd be comfortable outsourcing that to AI

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: It is definitely a case of collaborating with it rather than delegating complete tasks

nodes.label: AI as refinement tool for maintaining personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: frustrating, and a bit concerning, given you're loosing the personal service touch

nodes.label: AI for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If an AI tool can take over perhaps the more menial aspsects of the job allowing me to focus on more advanced areas

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: it will be supplementary tool on the side that might suggest edits

nodes.label: Professional accountability
nodes.grounding_span: From the point of view of accountability, I prefer to decide the action items myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and cost reduction
nodes.grounding_span: just to get a quick overall understanding of what the customer is referring to

nodes.label: Personal connection and customer relationships
nodes.grounding_span: There is something really to be said for having a human rep on the other side of the conversation

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely don't like the idea of losing out on areas to develop and learn

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: the summary is the most imporant bit and is what I used the most

nodes.label: Frustration with AI delegation due to poor output
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to decide the action items myself rather than base them solely on the ai

nodes.label: Concern about AI in data input due to consequences
nodes.grounding_span: I especially wouldn't want to leave data input to an AI because there can be serious consequences

nodes.label: Mixed feelings about AI in customer service
nodes.grounding_span: it is simultaneously satisfying and impressive ... but also frustrating, and a bit concerning

nodes.label: Resistance to letting skills dissipate
nodes.grounding_span: I would definitely resist the temptation to let my skills dissipate

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as editing aid
nodes.grounding_span: it will be supplementary tool on the side that might suggest edits

nodes.label: Preference for human oversight and final control
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to decide the action items myself rather than base them solely on the ai

nodes.label: Motivated skill preservation and growth orientation
nodes.grounding_span: I am personally a very motivated individual, and I feel I would definitely resist the temptation to let my skills dissipate
